cartDrawer.title: Your cart
cartDrawer.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# item in your cart} other {# items in your cart}}
cartDrawer.emptyDescription: Add a few essentials to keep your routine ready in one place.
cartDrawer.loginDescription: You need to sign in before you can view saved cart items and checkout details.
cartDrawer.loginCardBody: Sign in to see products, totals, and a smoother checkout experience.
